name: Arjun — Product Analyst supporting three PMs

goals: turn research into digestible summaries fast
keep metrics tied to what actually shipped
stop redoing analysis that exists somewhere
frustrations: research findings die in slide decks
success criteria are written once and never checked
hunting through folders for the latest version
profile.behaviour: Methodical. Reads labels literally — vague copy stalls him. Wants to see where every number came from.
profile.technicalAbility: medium-high — SQL and spreadsheets, light scripting
profile.preferredWorkflow: structured documents, consistent naming, source citations on everything
profile.budgetSensitivity: high — no budget authority, must convince a PM to expense it
profile.decisionStyle: influences the buyer rather than buying; recommends what saves him hours
